channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: 'No one is close': BlackRock’s Larry Fink warns Americans have saved egregiously less than they need for retirement - Fortune
item.description:
1. 'No one is close': BlackRock’s Larry Fink warns Americans have saved egregiously less than they need for retirement  Fortune
  2. BlackRock's Larry Fink Said Gen Z And Millennials Are 'Economically Anxious' For A Reason. They Blame Boomers For Focusing Only On Themselves  Yahoo Finance
  3. Is $2 Million Sufficient for Retirement? Experts Share Their Insights  Investopedia
  4. BlackRock: US Voters Support More Retirement Investment Options  planadviser
  5. Voters Support Child Savings Accounts  401k Specialist

item.title: Speech by Governor Barr on artificial intelligence and the labor market - Federal Reserve Board (.gov)
item.description:
1. Speech by Governor Barr on artificial intelligence and the labor market  Federal Reserve Board (.gov)
  2. Andrew Yang says AI will wipe out millions of white-collar jobs in the next 12 to 18 months  Business Insider
  3. America Isn’t Ready for What AI Will Do to Jobs  The Atlantic
  4. 20% of U.S. jobs are highly vulnerable to robots and automation, economists say  CBS News
  5. The real economics of AI and jobs  The World Economic Forum

item.title: Top tech investor calls software selloff a ‘generational’ moment to buy - Fortune
item.description:
1. Top tech investor calls software selloff a ‘generational’ moment to buy  Fortune
  2. JPMorgan Flags 'AI-Resilient' Software Names After Selloff  Yahoo Finance
  3. Vibe-Coding in Gas Town? A Guide to the Software Selloff With 4 SaaSy Stock Picks.  Barron's
  4. JPMorgan says buy the dip in these 14 high-quality software stocks set to buck further AI disruption  Business Insider
  5. Fund Beating 99% of Peers Sees Few Software Firms Surviving AI  Bloomberg.com
